board_brief: Standby-genset changeover sub-DB (DB-GENSET-XCV) for a generic IEC commercial 3-storey office. 63A TPN intake fed from MSB-MAIN F08 (63A MCCB Type D, 60m feeder) AND from standby genset 80 kVA via ATS (utility-priority mode; genset auto-start on utility loss per IEC 60364-5-56:2018 §552). 5 circuits: ATS controller + 4 downstream emergency feeds — EM lighting changeover feed to DB-EM, fire alarm changeover feed to DB-FA1, UPS bypass mains backup to DB-UPS, and genset day tank + cooling fan. Located in external genset enclosure with ATS in ground-floor plant room.

standards_stack.ats_standard: IEC 60364-5-56:2018 §552 (automatic transfer switching and changeover sources of supply) + §556 (safety services general) + §551 (low-voltage generating sets)
standards_stack.genset_transfer_standard: ISO 8528-12:1997 (Reciprocating internal combustion engine driven alternating current generating sets — Part 12: Emergency power supply to safety services)
standards_stack.emergency_power_practice: NFPA 110-2022 (Standard for Emergency and Standby Power Systems — Type 10 transfer time classification; AHJ-cross-referenced where US-aligned)
standards_stack.transfer_time_standard: BS EN 50171:2001+A1:2022 §6.3 (Central power supply systems for emergency lighting — transfer time requirements)
standards_stack.ups_bypass_standard: IEC 62040-1:2017 §5.2.4 (UPS bypass design — fault-current flow requirement)
standards_stack.fault_current_calc: IEC 60909-0:2016 §3.5 (calculation of short-circuit currents in three-phase a.c. systems — utility-side worst case) and §3.5.1 (generator-mode equivalent voltage source — lower Ik in genset mode)

supply.fed_from: MSB-MAIN F08 63A MCCB Type D (utility) AND standby genset 80 kVA via ATS (utility-priority mode)
supply.system_type: TN-S (utility transformer earthed; building distribution TN-S; genset neutral switched at ATS per IEC 60364-5-56:2018 §552 4-pole transfer + bonded to building TN-S earth in genset-mode via the ATS neutral bonding contact)
supply.transfer_time_design_intent_s: 6-10 (medium-genset typical; AHJ to confirm against BS EN 50171:2001+A1:2022 §6.3 vs NFPA 110-2022 Type 10 vs IEC 60364-5-56:2018 §556+§551)

board.location: external genset enclosure with ATS in ground-floor plant room
board.enclosure_rating: IP4X (indoor ATS section) + IP54 (external genset enclosure section)

circuits.designation: EM lighting changeover feed to DB-EM
Fire alarm changeover feed to DB-FA1
UPS bypass mains backup to DB-UPS
